req.title: Create observation
req.statement: A clinician shall create an Observation tied to a patient with LOINC-coded code element; Observations without code shall be rejected.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-005 mandates that observations must be tied to a patient with a LOINC-coded code element, and observations without code must be rejected with HTTP 422. The test suite covers: (1) positive case with valid LOINC code (EP—valid code partition), (2) negative case with missing code field (NEG—error pathway), (3) boundary case with empty/null code value (BVA—boundary of code presence), and (4) an additional negative case for invalid LOINC syntax (NEG—malformed code). All tests assume a pre-existing patient and clinician role. Tests are deterministic, idempotent, and use self-contained payloads.

tests.name: test_create_observation_with_valid_loinc_code
preconditions: Patient with ID 'patient-123' exists in system
actions: Include code object with LOINC system and code value
expected: Response includes subject reference to patient-123
trace: R-HLT-005: observation stored with valid code

tests.name: test_create_observation_without_code_field
actions: POST /Observation with payload missing code element
expected: Error message indicates missing or invalid code
tests.executable:
import requests

BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8080'
auth_header = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>'}

payload = {
  'resourceType': 'Observation',
  'status': 'final',
  'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/patient-456'},
  'effectiveDateTime': '2024-01-15T11:00:00Z'
}

resp = requests.post(
    f'{BASE_URL}/Observation',
    json=payload,
    headers=auth_header
)

assert resp.status_code == 422, f'Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}'
body = resp.json()
assert 'error' in body or 'issue' in body, 'Error details missing'

tests.name: test_create_observation_with_null_code_value
preconditions: Code field present but value is null
actions: POST /Observation with code field but null/empty value
Set code.coding[0].code to null or empty string
trace: R-HLT-005: boundary case—code field present but empty
Validation layer enforces non-empty LOINC code
Error pathway for invalid code format

tests.name: test_create_observation_with_invalid_loinc_format
preconditions: Code syntax does not conform to LOINC format
trace: LOINC validation fails on malformed code
